text1.text: เลขที่เอกสาร

text2.text: วันที่เอกสาร

r_amnat_debt_collection_book_coll_name_n.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive, sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = {0} ) AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = {1} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {2} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {3} )
ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
